kirundi.ice_shell_over_a_subsurface_ocean_top_: Igishishwa c'urubura hejuru y'inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso. Ahantu heza kurusha ahandi ho gushakira ubuzima bw'ahandi!
kirundi.largest_moon_in_the_solar_system_bigge: Ukwezi kunini kurusha andi muri sisitemu y'izuba. Kurenze Mercury! Gufite umurima wako bwite wa magneti.
kirundi.most_heavily_cratered_object_in_the_so: Ikintu gifite imyobo myinshi kurusha ibindi muri sisitemu y'izuba. Gishobora kuba gifite inyanja munsi y'ubuso.
kirundi.only_moon_with_a_thick_atmosphere_has_: Ukwezi kwonyine gufite ikirere gikomeye. Gufite ibiyaga n'imigezi vya metani y'amazi!
kirundi.geysers_of_water_vapor_erupting_from_t: Amasoko y'umwuka w'amazi asohoka ku mpera y'epfo. Inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso yaremejwe!
kirundi.giant_herschel_crater_makes_it_look_li: Umwobo munini Herschel utuma kugaragara nka Death Star ya Star Wars!
kirundi.two_toned_one_half_bright_white_the_ot: Amabara abiri: igice kimwe cera cane, ikindi cirabura nk'amakara. Gufite umusozi munini ku murongo wo hagati.
kirundi.most_geologically_diverse_moon_has_a_2: Ukwezi gufite ubutandukane bwa geologiya bwinshi kurusha andi. Gufite urutare ruhagaze rw'uburabure bwa km 20 rwitwa Verona Rupes!
kirundi.largest_moon_of_uranus_named_after_the: Ukwezi kunini kurusha andi kwa Uranus. Kwahawe izina ry'umwamikazi w'ibisamanyanga muri Shakespeare.
kirundi.brightest_and_possibly_youngest_surfac: Ubuso bumurika kandi bushobora kuba buto mu myaka mu mezi manini ya Uranus.
kirundi.orbits_backwards_probably_a_captured_k: Kuzenguruka kwako ni ukw'inyuma! Bishoboka ko ari ikintu cafashwe kivuye mu Mukandara wa Kuiper. Gufite amasoko ya azote.
kirundi.half_the_size_of_pluto_they_orbit_each: Kingana na kimwe ca kabiri ca Pluto! Bizengurukana (imibumbe mito y'impanga). Gufite ingofero itukura ku mpera.
kirundi.no_atmosphere_stars_visible_even_durin: Nta kirere — inyenyeri zigaragara ndetse no ku manywa. Izuba rigaragara rinini kandi rimurika cane.
kirundi.permanent_overcast_surface_bathed_in_d: Ibicu igihe cose. Ubuso bwuzuye urumuri rw'oranje rw'ikinyafu. Inkuba zimurika hejuru.
kirundi.blue_sky_from_rayleigh_scattering_5_00: Ikirere c'ubururu kubera gutatana kwa Rayleigh. Inyenyeri ~5.000 zigaragara n'amaso masa.
kirundi.butterscotch_sky_from_iron_dust_blue_s: Ikirere c'ibara ry'umuhondo-ikigina kubera umukungugu w'icuma. Izuba rirenga ryera ubururu! Phobos izamuka inshuro 2 ku munsi.
kirundi.no_surface_from_cloud_tops_see_auroras: Nta buso — uhereye ku mpinga z'ibicu, ubona aurora imurika inshuro 100 kurusha iy'Isi.
kirundi.rings_visible_as_bright_arcs_overhead_: Impeta zigaragara nk'imirongo imurika hejuru. Uhereye kuri Titan: ikirere c'igihu c'oranje, Saturn igaragara inini inshuro 11 kurusha Ukwezi kwacu kuzuye.
kirundi.sun_just_a_very_bright_point_42_year_s: Izuba ni akadomo kamurika cane gusa. Ibihe vy'imyaka 42. Kunama gukabije bivuze ko Izuba rishobora kuba hejuru cane ku mpera.
kirundi.sun_900x_dimmer_than_on_earth_still_30: Izuba rimurika inshuro 900 munsi y'uko rimurika ku Isi. Nyamara riracamurika inshuro 300 kurusha Ukwezi kuzuye ku Isi.
kirundi.charon_appears_7x_larger_than_our_moon: Charon igaragara inini inshuro 7 kurusha Ukwezi kwacu. Bafatanye ku buryo bw'imiraba — Charon ihagaze idahindagurika mu kirere.

kirundi.golden_haze_rings_visible_overhead: Igihu ca zahabu. Impeta zigaragara hejuru.
kirundi.golden_white_cloud_bands_calmer_than_j: Imikandara y'ibicu ya zahabu-yera, ituje kurusha iya Jupiter

kirundi.deep_blue_from_methane_absorption: Ubururu bwimbitse kubera ko metani ifata urumuri
kirundi.superionic_water_at_extreme_pressure: Amazi ya superionike ku gitutu gikabije
kirundi.literal_diamonds_raining_down_through_: Ibigeragezo vyerekana ko diyama nyazo zigwa nk'imvura muri ubwo bujyakuzimu
kirundi.closest_known_exoplanet_in_habitable_z: Exoplanet iri hafi kurusha izindi zizwi! Iri mu gace gatuwe k'inyenyeri iri hafi kurusha izindi.
kirundi.one_of_7_rocky_planets_best_candidate_: Umwe mu mibumbe 7 y'urutare. Ahantu heza kurusha ahandi ho kubona amazi adakonje.
kirundi.earth_s_bigger_cousin_sun_like_star_38: « Muvyara munini » w'Isi. Inyenyeri isa n'Izuba. Umwaka w'iminsi 385.
kirundi.rains_molten_glass_sideways_blue_color: Igwisha ikirahure cashongeshejwe kiruhande! Ibara ry'ubururu riva ku duce twa silikate.
kirundi.super_earth_covered_in_lava_oceans_may: Isi-Nkuru ipfukiranywe n'inyanja za lave. Ishobora kuba ifite intima ya diyama.
kirundi.so_hot_that_iron_vaporizes_on_the_day_: Ishyushye cane ku buryo icuma gihinduka umwuka ku ruhande rw'amanywa kikagwa nk'imvura ya metali y'amazi nijoro!
kirundi.first_exoplanet_ever_discovered_1992_o: Exoplanet ya mbere yavumbuwe (1992)! Izenguruka inyenyeri yapfuye ya pulsar.
kirundi.earth_sized_planet_in_habitable_zone_d: Umubumbe ungana n'Isi uri mu gace gatuwe. Wavumbuwe na TESS mu 2020.
kirundi.tiny_magnetic_field_from_partially_mol: Umurima muto wa magneti uva ku ntima yashonze igice. Ntuhagije kurinda ubuso.
kirundi.no_global_magnetic_field_solar_wind_in: Nta murima wa magneti w'umubumbe wose. Umuyaga w'izuba uhurira n'ikirere ako kanya.
kirundi.strong_dipole_field_from_liquid_iron_o: Umurima ukomeye wa dipole uva ku ntima yo hanze y'icuma c'amazi. Ukora imikandara ya Van Allen. Ni ingenzi ku buzima!
kirundi.lost_its_global_field_4_billion_years_: Wabuze umurima wawo w'umubumbe wose mu myaka ~miliyari 4 ishize. Magnetisimu isigaye mu gishishwa ca kera.
kirundi.strongest_in_solar_system_deadly_radia: Ukomeye kurusha iyindi muri sisitemu y'izuba! Imikandara y'imirasire yica. Hidorojene ya metali ikora uwo murima.
kirundi.unique_almost_perfectly_aligned_with_r: Udasanzwe: uhuye hafi neza n'umurongo wo kuzenguruka. Intima ya hidorojene ya metali.
kirundi.tilted_59_from_rotation_axis_off_cente: Wanamye 59° uvuye ku murongo wo kuzenguruka! Nturi hagati. Imiterere idasanzwe cane.
kirundi.also_highly_tilted_47_and_off_center_c: Nawo wanamye cane (47°) kandi nturi hagati. Ibidukikije vya magneti bigoye.
kirundi.too_small_and_cold_for_a_dynamo_no_pro: Muto kandi ukonje cane ku buryo hataba dinamo. Nta kirinda umuyaga w'izuba.
kirundi.venus_has_a_runaway_greenhouse_effect_: Venus ifite ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera zidashobora guhagarara zigera kuri 462°C!
kirundi.saturn_has_146_known_moons_as_of_2024: Saturn ifite amezi 293 azwi ku rutonde rwa JPL rw'amasatelite y'imibumbe rw'ubu.
kirundi.uranus_has_an_axial_tilt_of_97_77: Uranus yanamye ku murongo wayo ku rugero rwa 97.77°!
kirundi.mercury_is_only_4_879_km_in_diameter: Mercury ifite umurambararo wa km 4,879 gusa.
kirundi.pluto_takes_248_earth_years_to_orbit_t: Pluto ifata imyaka 248 y'Isi kugira ngo izenguruke Izuba!
kirundi.iron_oxide_rust_gives_mars_its_red_col: Okiside y'icuma (ingese) ni yo iha Mars ibara ryayo ritukura.
kirundi.saturn_s_density_is_less_than_water_0_: Ubwinshi bwa Saturn buri munsi y'ubw'amazi (0.687 g/cm³)!
kirundi.olympus_mons_on_mars_is_21_9_km_high_n: Olympus Mons kuri Mars ifite uburabure bwa km 21.9 — hafi inshuro 3 za Everest!
kirundi.neptune_s_winds_reach_2_100_km_h: Imiyaga ya Neptune igera kuri 2,100 km/h!
kirundi.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_charge: Umurima wa magneti w'Isi wirukana uduce dufite amashanyarazi duva ku zuba. Ozone ifasha kuri UV, ariko magnetosifeeri ni yo ngabo y'ibanze!
kirundi.the_iau_s_2006_definition_requires_pla: Ibisobanuro vya IAU vyo mu 2006 bisaba ko imibumbe isukura inzira yayo y'orbite ikayivanamo ibindi bisigazwa.
kirundi.also_called_the_goldilocks_zone_not_to: Nanone hitwa « agace ka Goldilocks » — ntigashyuha cane, ntigakonja cane, ku buryo amazi adakonje yabaho ku buso.
kirundi.the_moon_rotates_exactly_once_per_orbi: Ukwezi kuzenguruka rimwe gusa kuri buri rugendo — uku guhuza guterwa n'imbaraga z'imiraba mu myaka miliyari.
kirundi.opportunity_rover_found_hematite_blueb: Rover Opportunity yabonye « uduterekurutsi » twa hematite — amabuye ashobora gukorwa gusa mu mazi. Amafoto yo mu kirere yerekana inkengero za kera z'imigezi!
kirundi.venus_is_hotter_462_c_vs_430_c_mercury: Venus irushyushye (462°C kuri 430°C)! Mercury nta kirere ifite co gufata ubushyuhe. Ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera ni zo zibanza kuruta intera.
kirundi.gas_giants_have_no_solid_surface_they_: Ibihangange vya gaze nta buso bukomeye bifite! Ni gaze ya hidorojene na heliyumu ahanini igenda ikomera uko wegera intima. Sonde yamanuka itagira aho igarukira.
kirundi.earth_s_distance_from_the_sun_doesn_t_: Intera y'Isi n'Izuba ntihinduka ku munsi. Saa sita bivuze gusa ko Izuba riri hejuru cane mu kirere cawe. Isi iba hafi cane muri Mutarama (perihelion)!
kirundi.jupiter_is_11x_wider_than_earth_and_1_: Jupiter iragutse inshuro 11 kurusha Isi, kandi Isi 1,300 zashoboraga kwinjira muri yo! Sisitemu y'izuba ifite itandukaniro rikabije ry'ubunini.
kirundi.pluto_is_still_in_the_solar_system_it_: Pluto iracari muri sisitemu y'izuba! Yavanywe ku « mubumbe » ishyirwa ku « mubumbe muto » mu 2006, ariko iracazenguruka Izuba.
kirundi.the_asteroid_belt_is_mostly_empty_spac: Umukandara wa asteroyide ahanini ni ubusa! Intera iri hagati ya asteroyide ni miliyoni za km. Ivyogajuru binyuramo nta kaga.
kirundi.not_always_saturn_is_95x_earth_s_mass_: Si buri gihe! Saturn ifite misa inshuro 95 y'Isi ariko rukuruzi ku buso ni 1.06g gusa kuko ari nini kandi ifite ubwinshi buke. Ibiro biterwa na misa NA rayo.
kirundi.all_parts_of_the_moon_receive_sunlight: Ibice vyose vy'Ukwezi bibona urumuri rw'izuba! « Uruhande rwa kure » ni igice tudashobora kubona tuvuye ku Isi kubera gufatwa n'imiraba. Kibona Izuba nk'ibindi.
kirundi.the_habitable_zone_or_goldilocks_zone_: Agace gatuwe (canke « agace ka Goldilocks ») ni urwego rw'intera uvuye ku nyenyeri aho amazi adakonje yashobora kubaho ku buso bw'umubumbe. Muri sisitemu yacu y'izuba, Venus iri ku mpera yo imbere, Isi iri hagati, na Mars iri ku mpera yo hanze. Ariko kugira amazi adakonje binasaba ikirere n'umurima wa magneti bikwiye!
kirundi.when_sunlight_heats_a_planet_s_surface: Iyo urumuri rw'izuba rushyushya ubuso bw'umubumbe, ubuso busohora ubushyuhe (infarageru). Gaze z'inzu y'ibimera (CO₂, CH₄, H₂O) zifata ubwo bushyuhe zikongera kubusohora, bigashyushya umubumbe. Inzu y'ibimera y'Isi ni +33°C (itunga ubuzima). Iya Venus ni +510°C (idashobora guhagarara). Mars ntayigira na gato (-60°C ku mpuzandengo). Ingano ya gaze y'inzu y'ibimera ni yo igena icavamo!
kirundi.a_planet_s_magnetic_field_creates_a_ma: Umurima wa magneti w'umubumbe ukora « magnetosifeeri » — ingabo itagaragara yirukana umuyaga w'izuba (uduce dufite amashanyarazi duva ku Zuba). Magnetosifeeri y'Isi irinda ikirere cacu kandi ituma ubuzima bushoboka. Mars yabuze umurima wayo wa magneti mu myaka miliyari 4 ishize, maze ikirere cayo kigenda kivanwaho buhoro. Magnetosifeeri ya Jupiter ikomeye inshuro 20,000 kurusha iy'Isi!
kirundi.in_2006_the_international_astronomical: Mu 2006, Ihuriro Mpuzamahanga ry'Ubumenyi bw'Ikirere ryashyizeho ibipimo bitatu vy'umubumbe: (1) Uzenguruka Izuba ✓, (2) Ufite misa ihagije yo kugira imiterere y'uruziga ✓, (3) « Wasukuye orbite yawo » uvanamo ibindi bisigazwa ✗. Pluto isangira agace kayo k'orbite n'ibihumbi vy'ibintu vyo mu Mukandara wa Kuiper, bityo ishyirwa mu « mibumbe mito ». Ivyo ntibituma iba idashimishije — New Horizons yerekanye ko ikora mu buryo bwa geologiya!
kirundi.over_billions_of_years_gravitational_t: Mu myaka miliyari, imbaraga za rukuruzi z'imiraba zishobora kugabanya umuvuduko wo kuzenguruka kw'ukwezi kugeza kuhuye n'igihe cako co kuzenguruka. Icavuyemo: uruhande rumwe ruhora rwerekeye ku mubumbe. Ukwezi kwacu gufashwe n'imiraba y'Isi. Mercury ifashwe igice n'Izuba (igipimo 3:2). Pluto na Charon bafatanye — bahora bereka uruhande rumwe!
kirundi.a_biosignature_is_any_evidence_of_past: Ikimenyetso c'ubuzima ni ikintu cose kigaragaza ubuzima bwa kera canke ubw'ubu. Abahanga barondera: (1) amazi adakonje, (2) molekile ngugu, (3) gaze zo mu kirere nka ogisijene canke metani zitari kubaho ubuzima butazikoze, (4) inkomoko z'ingufu. Ahantu heza kurusha ahandi muri sisitemu yacu y'izuba: Mars (amazi ya kera), Europa (inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso), Enceladus (amasoko y'amazi), na Titan (ibiyaga vya metani).
kirundi.smallest_planet_no_atmosphere_to_retai: Umubumbe muto kurusha iyindi; nta kirere co gufata ubushyuhe.
kirundi.hottest_planet_due_to_runaway_greenhou: Umubumbe ushyushye kurusha iyindi kubera ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera zidashobora guhagarara. Uzenguruka wisubiranya!
kirundi.only_known_planet_with_liquid_water_an: Umubumbe wonyine uzwiho amazi adakonje n'ubuzima.
kirundi.has_the_tallest_volcano_in_the_solar_s: Ufite ikirunga kirekire kurusha ibindi muri sisitemu y'izuba: Olympus Mons (uburabure bwa km 21.9).
kirundi.largest_planet_the_great_red_spot_is_a: Umubumbe munini kurusha iyindi. Agace Kanini Gatukura ni inkubi y'umuyaga irenze Isi!
kirundi.its_rings_are_made_of_ice_and_rock_cou: Impeta zawo zikozwe mu rubura n'urutare. Zashoboraga kureremba mu kabindi kanini k'amazi!
kirundi.rotates_on_its_side_an_ice_giant_with_: Uzenguruka uryamye ku ruhande! Igihangange c'urubura gifite ikirere ca metani.
kirundi.windiest_planet_winds_up_to_2_100_km_h: Umubumbe ufite imiyaga myinshi: imiyaga igera kuri 2,100 km/h. Ubururu bwimbitse bwa metani.
kirundi.dwarf_planet_since_2006_has_a_heart_sh: Umubumbe muto kuva mu 2006. Ufite urubura runini rufite imiterere y'umutima rwitwa Tombaugh Regio.
kirundi.smallest_planet_closest_to_the_sun_no_: Umubumbe muto kurusha iyindi, uri hafi y'Izuba kurusha iyindi, nta kirere nyakuri ufite.
kirundi.thick_co_atmosphere_runaway_greenhouse: Ikirere gikomeye ca CO₂, ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera zidashobora guhagarara, uzenguruka wisubiranya.
kirundi.our_home_liquid_water_magnetosphere_li: Urugo rwacu — amazi adakonje, magnetosifeeri, ubuzima.
kirundi.thin_atmosphere_iron_oxide_surface_two: Ikirere gito, ubuso bwa okiside y'icuma, amezi abiri mato.
kirundi.gas_giant_great_red_spot_95_known_moon: Igihangange ca gaze, Agace Kanini Gatukura, amezi 115 azwi.

kirundi.the_sun_has_an_11_year_cycle_of_sunspo: Izuba rifite uruziga rw'imyaka 11 rw'ibikorwa vy'utudomo tw'izuba. Nyuza urabe utudomo tw'izuba tuza tukagenda + ibiturika vya CME.
kirundi.the_sun_cycles_every_11_years_between_: Izuba rizenguruka buri myaka ~11 hagati y'igipimo gito (utudomo duke, gutuza) n'igipimo kinini (utudomo twinshi, ibirimi vy'izuba na CME kenshi). Uruziga rwa 25 rwageze ku ntera ndende mu 2024-2025 kandi ubu ruragabanuka.
kirundi.where_could_life_as_we_know_it_survive: Ni hehe ubuzima nk'ubwo tuzi bwabasha kubaho hafi y'inyenyeri iyo ari yo yose? Hindura urumuri rw'inyenyeri + intera y'umubumbe urabe.
kirundi.the_habitable_zone_is_where_surface_wa: Agace gatuwe ni aho amazi yo ku buso ashobora kuguma adakonje. Impera yo imbere: ingaruka z'inzu y'ibimera zumisha amazi. Impera yo hanze: urubura rufata CO2, ubukonje bugakavya. Impera zihinduka nka √L.
kirundi.drag_the_moon_closer_to_make_earth_s_t: Kurura Ukwezi kwegere kugira ngo imiraba y'Isi ikure. Menya ko kuvyimba kuba ku mpande zombi, iyo hafi n'iyo kure.
kirundi.tides_happen_because_gravity_pulls_mor: Imiraba ibaho kuko rukuruzi ikurura cane ku ruhande rwa hafi kurusha uruhande rwa kure rw'Isi. Impande zombi ziravyimba. Izuba n'Ukwezi bifatanyije bikora imiraba minini (iyo bihujwe ku murongo) n'imito (iyo bihagaze ku nguni).
kirundi.rotate_earth_and_adjust_season_watch_t: Zungurutsa Isi kandi uhindure igihe c'umwaka. Raba umurongo utandukanya amanywa n'ijoro ugenda + kunama kw'umurongo gukahindura igice c'isi kimurikiwe.
kirundi.five_gravitational_sweet_spots_between: Ibibanza bitanu vya rukuruzi hagati y'imibiri ibiri aho ivyogajuru bishobora guhagarara. James Webb iri kuri L2.
kirundi.green_stable_equilibria_l4_l5_yellow_u: Icatsi: uburinganire buhamye (L4, L5) • Umuhondo: budahamye ariko bufite akamaro (L1, L2, L3)
kirundi.five_points_in_any_two_body_orbit_wher: Ibibanza bitanu muri buri orbite y'imibiri ibiri aho rukuruzi n'imbaraga zisunika hanze bipimana. Ivyogajuru bishobora guhagarara hano bikoresheje lisansi nkeya. JWST iri kuri L2 — buri gihe inyuma y'Isi, kure y'Izuba.
kirundi.each_element_fingerprints_light_in_spe: Buri lementi ishushanya urumuri ku burabure bw'imiraba bwihariye. Nyuza kuri lementi urabe uko abahanga b'ikirere bazimenya mu nyenyeri za kure.
kirundi.every_element_emits_its_own_unique_pat: Buri lementi isohora imiterere yayo bwite y'uburabure bw'imiraba y'urumuri — ikimenyetso cayo ca sipekitoro. Turavye urumuri ruva ku nyenyeri za kure, dushobora kumenya ibizigize. Ni ko tuzi ko Izuba ari 75% hidorojene!
kirundi.click_constellations_to_see_their_star: Kanda ku matsinda y'inyenyeri urabe inyenyeri zayo + imirongo ihuza. Buri nyenyeri ifite ibara ryayo bwite + izina nyakuri.
kirundi.constellations_are_patterns_of_stars_t: Amatsinda y'inyenyeri ni imiterere y'inyenyeri imico itandukanye yamenye mu binyejana vyinshi. IAU yashyizeho amatsinda 88 yemewe mu 1922. Inyenyeri ziri mu itsinda rimwe akenshi ntizegeranye koko — zigaragara zegeranye zirabwe ku Isi gusa.
kirundi.how_much_delta_v_travel_time_to_reach_: Delta-v ingana ite + igihe c'urugendo kingana iki kugira ngo ugere ahantu hatandukanye? Ama orbite y'ukwimuka kwa Hohmann yerekanwe.
kirundi.a_hohmann_transfer_is_the_most_fuel_ef_2: Ukwimuka kwa Hohmann ni uburyo bukoresha lisansi nkeya kurusha ubundi bwo kwimuka hagati y'ama orbite abiri y'uruziga. Bukoresha gutwika kabiri: rimwe ryo kwinjira mu elipsi y'ukwimuka, irindi ryo kuyihindura uruziga aho ugana. Δv ni impinduka yose y'umuvuduko ikenewe.
kirundi.mars_rover_pathfinder: 🚗 Umurondera w'Inzira wa Rover ya Mars
kirundi.pilot_a_rover_from_start_to_goal_plan_: Yobora rover uhereye ku ntangiriro kugera ku ntego. Teganya inzira ikikije amabuye n'imisozi; witondere lisansi yawe!
kirundi.drive_the_rover_from_start_to_goal_cos: Yobora rover uhereye ku ntangiriro kugera ku ntego. Ikiguzi: ubutaka buringaniye 1,
kirundi.plan_the_path_to_conserve_fuel_like_re: Teganya inzira kugira ngo uzigame lisansi. Nka rover nyazo za Mars, buri metero isaba kugena lisansi.
kirundi.how_astronomers_measure_distance_each_: Uko abahanga b'ikirere bapima intera: buri buryo bushingira ku bukurikira. Zamuka uhereye ku bunini bw'Isi ugere ku isanzure rigaragara.
kirundi.compared_sun_angle_in_two_cities_first: Yagereranyije inguni y'izuba mu migi ibiri. Ipima rya mbere ry'Isi.
kirundi.hipparchus_150_bce_used_earth_s_shadow: Hipparchus (~150 BCE) yakoresheje igicucu c'Isi ku Kwezi mu gihe c'ubwirakabiri kugira ngo agereranye intera.
kirundi.defines_the_astronomical_unit_modern_r: Isobanura igipimo c'ikirere (AU). Radar za none zipima neza kugeza kuri metero.
kirundi.kepler_s_third_law_distance_from_orbit: Itegeko rya gatatu rya Kepler: intera iva ku gihe co kuzenguruka. Ubu vyemejwe n'ivyogajuru.
kirundi.earth_s_orbit_gives_2_au_baseline_star: Orbite y'Isi itanga urufatiro rwa 2 AU. Inyenyeri isa n'iyimuka uko ibihe vy'umwaka bihinduka.
kirundi.pulsation_period_reveals_true_brightne: Igihe co guhinda cerekana urumuri nyakuri. Gereranya n'urumuri rugaragara ubone intera.
kirundi.same_cepheid_method_extended_to_other_: Uburyo bumwe bwa Cepheid bwagejejwe ku zindi galagisi. Hubble yerekanye mu 1923 ko Andromeda iri hanze ya galagisi yacu.
kirundi.more_distant_galaxies_are_receding_fas: Galagisi ziri kure cane zitugendaho vuba. v = H × d itanga intera.
kirundi.cosmic_microwave_background_is_light_f: Imirasire ya Mikorowave y'Isanzure ni urumuri rw'imyaka miliyari 13.8 ishize, rwaramburwa no kwagurwa kw'isanzure.
kirundi.light_from_receding_objects_redshifts_: Urumuri ruva ku bintu bitugendaho ruhinduka gutukura; ruva ku vyegera, ruhinduka ubururu. Ni ko dupima intera z'isanzure + tukamenya ko isanzure ryagurwa.
kirundi.how_much_of_a_planet_s_incoming_sunlig: Ni ingana iki mu rumuri rw'izuba rugera ku mubumbe rugarurwa ugereranyije n'urufatwa? Ivyo ni vyo bigena ubushyuhe bw'umubumbe wose.
kirundi.albedo_fraction_of_light_reflected_ice: Albedo = igice c'urumuri rugarurwa. Urubura + ibicu bigarura cane (albedo nini); ubutaka bw'umwijima + amazi birafata (albedo nto). Kugarura kwinshi = umubumbe ukonje kurushaho. Iri ni ryo huriro rya urubura-albedo ritera ibihe vy'urubura.
kirundi.13_8_billion_years_compressed_into_a_s: Imyaka miliyari 13.8 yashyizwe mu murongo umwe w'itoranya. Nyuza uhereye ku ngingo imwe kugeza uyu munsi.
kirundi.spacetime_matter_compressed_to_a_point: Umwanya-igihe + ibintu vyakandamirijwe mu kadomo kamwe
kirundi.universe_expands_by_10_in_a_fraction_o: Isanzure ryagurwa inshuro 10²⁶ mu gice c'isegonda
kirundi.quarks_bind_into_protons_and_neutrons: Kwark zihuza zikora poroton na neutron
kirundi.first_atomic_nuclei_hydrogen_helium_li: Intima za mbere za atomu: hidorojene, heliyumu, litiyumu
kirundi.first_atoms_cmb_photons_released: Atomu za mbere; foton za CMB zirekurwa
kirundi.no_stars_mostly_neutral_hydrogen_dark_: Nta nyenyeri; ahanini hidorojene idafite amashanyarazi + ibintu vy'umwijima
kirundi.population_iii_stars_massive_short_liv: Inyenyeri za Population III: nini, z'ubuzima bugufi
kirundi.mergers_create_the_first_galaxy_seeds: Guhurira bikora imbuto za mbere za galagisi
kirundi.most_galaxies_assembled_star_formation: Galagisi nyinshi zarateranye; gukorwa kw'inyenyeri kugera hejuru
kirundi.the_universe_is_13_8_billion_years_old: Isanzure rifite imyaka miliyari 13.8. Ryatangiye ari rikomeye kandi rishyushye bidapimika, hanyuma ryaguka rikonja. Galagisi zabayeho ku myaka miliyari 1, Izuba ryacu ku myaka miliyari 9, natwe turi hano ku myaka miliyari 13.8.
kirundi.click_incoming_asteroids_before_they_r: Kanda kuri asteroyide zigana ku Isi mbere y'uko zigerayo. Nka DART ya NASA yo kurinda imibumbe.
kirundi.real_nasa_program_dart_double_asteroid: Porogaramu nyayo ya NASA: DART (Double Asteroid Redirection Test) yahinduye neza orbite ya Dimorphos mu 2022. Ibiro Bihuriza Hamwe Kurinda Imibumbe bikurikirana ibintu +30,000 biri hafi y'Isi.
kirundi.four_galaxy_morphologies_spirals_like_: Imiterere ine ya galagisi. Iz'ibizunguruzi nk'iyacu zerekana amaboko agaragaza aho inyenyeri zikorerwa. Iz'elipsi ni za kera, izitagira imiterere zifite akajagari.
kirundi.bigger_aperture_gathers_more_light_res: Umuryango munini ukusanya urumuri rwinshi + ugaragaza ibintu bito. Kwagura ntibifite akamaro kangana n'uko utekereza.
kirundi.aperture_matters_more_than_magnificati: Umuryango ufite akamaro kurusha kwagura! Objectif nini ikusanya urumuri rwinshi + igaragaza ibintu bito. Kwagura kurenze inshuro ~20 kuri cm y'umuryango bituma bijegajega gusa. Indorerwamo ya m 6.5 ya JWST yiga galagisi zo mu myaka miliyoni magana make ya mbere nyuma ya Big Bang.
kirundi.drag_the_altitude_slider_up_through_ea: Kurura umurongo w'uburabure uzamuke mu kirere c'Isi. Igitutu kiragabanuka, ubushyuhe burahinduka, na shimi ihinduka urwego ku rundi.
kirundi.weather_happens_here_temperature_decre: Ikirere kibera hano. Ubushyuhe bugabanuka uko uzamuka.
kirundi.ozone_layer_absorbs_uv_temperature_inc: Urwego rwa ozone rufata UV. Ubushyuhe bwiyongera uko uzamuka.
kirundi.meteors_burn_up_here_coldest_layer_90_: Ibisasu vyo mu kirere bitwikira hano. Urwego rukonje kurusha izindi (-90°C).
kirundi.iss_orbits_here_400km_aurora_glow_very: ISS izenguruka hano (400km). Aurora iramurika. Umwuka muke cane ariko ushyushye.
kirundi.boundary_to_space_air_escapes_to_space: Umupaka ugana mu kirere. Umwuka usohoka ujya mu kirere.
kirundi.galileo_s_1610_observations_venus_goes: Ivyo Galileo yabonye mu 1610: Venus inyura mu vyiciro. Ivyo vyerekanye ko Venus izenguruka Izuba, atari Isi.
kirundi.galileo_s_1610_discovery_venus_has_pha: Ico Galileo yavumbuye mu 1610: Venus ifite ivyiciro nk'ivy'Ukwezi
kirundi.in_1610_galileo_observed_venus_through: Mu 1610 Galileo yaravye Venus muri telesikopi ye abona ko inyura mu vyiciro — nk'Ukwezi. Iki cari ikimenyetso ko Venus izenguruka Izuba, atari Isi. Sisitemu ya Ptolemy ishyira Isi hagati ntishobora gusobanura Venus yuzuye. Ni ikimenyetso gikomeye c'uko Izuba riri hagati nk'uko Copernicus yabivuze.
kirundi.a_magnetic_field_deflects_solar_wind_p: Umurima wa magneti wirukana umuyaga w'izuba + urinda ikirere. Mars yabuze vyombi; ni yo mpamvu ari ubutayu.
kirundi.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_most_s: Umurima wa magneti w'Isi wirukana umuyaga mwinshi w'izuba, ukarinda ikirere + ubuzima. Mars yabuze umurima wayo wa magneti mu myaka ~miliyari 4 ishize maze ibura ikirere cayo buhoro. Jupiter ifite umurima ukomeye kurusha iyindi muri sisitemu y'izuba.
kirundi.switch_between_size_and_distance_views: Hindura hagati y'iraba ry'ubunini n'iry'intera. Vyombi ntibishobora kwerekanwa ku gipimo icarimwe — ni ko ikirere kiri ubusa koko.
kirundi.true_scales_are_hard_to_show_simultane: Ni bigoye kwerekana ibipimo nyavyo icarimwe. Iyo Isi iba ari akashaza, Izuba ryari kuba umupira w'inyanja uri ibirenge 200 uvuye aho. Iyo intera ziri ku gipimo, imibumbe ihinduka ududomo tutagaragara. Ibishushanyo vyinshi birahuza.
kirundi.thrust_to_slow_your_descent_land_softe: Koresha imbaraga zo gutindisha kumanuka kwawe. Gwa buhoro kurusha 2.5 m/s canke uzavunika. Raba lisansi — ntihagije yo guhagarara mu kirere.
kirundi.apollo_11_nearly_ran_out_of_fuel_durin: Apollo 11 yenda kubura lisansi mu gihe co kumanuka ku Kwezi. Neil Armstrong yafashe ubuyobozi mu ntoki asimbura ubuyobozi bw'ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo ashake ahantu horoshye ho kugwa. Bageze hasi hasigaye ~amasegonda 25 ya lisansi.
kirundi.pick_a_destination_see_how_long_light_: Toranya aho ugana + urabe igihe urumuri rufata ngo rugerayo. Hanze ya sisitemu y'izuba, intera ziba nini bitangaje.
kirundi.nearest_large_galaxy: Galagisi nini iri hafi kurusha izindi
kirundi.light_moves_300_000_km_s_we_see_distan: Urumuri rugenda 300,000 km/s. Tubona ibintu vya kure uko vyari bimeze igihe urumuri rwabivaho. Izuba tubona rifite iminota 8; Proxima Centauri ifite imyaka 4. Galagisi Andromeda ifite imyaka miliyoni 2.5.
kirundi.where_exactly_does_the_sun_rise_set_it: Izuba rirasira kandi rirenga hehe neza? Biterwa na latitude yawe + umunsi. Gerageza Maine ugereranyije n'Uruziga rw'Amajyaruguru.
kirundi.sun_path_depends_on_latitude_season_at: Inzira y'Izuba iterwa na latitude + igihe c'umwaka. Ku murongo wa ekwateri, izuba rijya hejuru neza. Ku Ruziga rw'Amajyaruguru, izuba rya saa sita z'ijoro ku munsi murabure w'impeshyi + ijoro ry'impera ku munsi mugufi w'itumba. I Portland muri Maine: mu mpeshyi izuba riba hejuru; mu itumba, izuba rirenga rikiri hafi y'aho ijisho rigarukira.
kirundi.some_moons_may_host_life_europa_encela: Amezi amwe ashobora kuba afite ubuzima: Europa + Enceladus + Titan + Ganymede afite inyanja munsi y'ubuso. Ubutumwa burimo gurondera ubu.
kirundi.subsurface_ocean_has_2_water_of_earth_: Inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso ifite amazi angana inshuro 2 n'inyanja z'Isi. Ivyanya vy'amazi ashyushye bishobora kuba biri hasi mu nyanja. Ubutumwa JUICE + Europa Clipper burakomeje.
kirundi.cassini_discovered_geysers_spraying_wa: Cassini yavumbuye amasoko atera amazi + ibintu ngugu + hidorojene + silika. Shimi y'ayo mazi yerekana ibigize n'inkomoko z'ingufu vyashobora gutunga ubuzima.
kirundi.thick_atmosphere_of_n2_ch4_lakes_of_li: Ikirere gikomeye ca N2 + CH4. Ibiyaga vya metani y'amazi ku buso. Inyanja y'amazi-amoniyake hepfo. Ubuzima burashoboka ariko butandukanye cane.
kirundi.largest_moon_subsurface_ocean_confirme: Ukwezi kunini kurusha andi. Ibimenyetso bikomeye vya Hubble vy'inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso. Ubutumwa JUICE buzakwiga.
kirundi.oldest_visible_surface_in_solar_system: Ubuso bwa kera kurusha ubundi bugaragara muri sisitemu y'izuba. Inyanja iri munsi y'ubuso irashoboka. Imirasire nkeya kurusha ku yandi mezi ya Jupiter.
kirundi.most_volcanically_active_body_in_solar: Umubiri ufite ibirunga bikora vyinshi kurusha indi muri sisitemu y'izuba. Ibirunga 400+ bikora. Ikirere ca diyokiside ya sufure. Ntikitujwe.
kirundi.what_would_it_take_to_make_mars_liveab: Ni iki cakenerwa kugira ngo Mars ibashe gutuzwa? Hindura gaze y'inzu y'ibimera, gushonga kw'urubura, n'ibimera bipfukirana — raba Mars ihinduka.
kirundi.terraforming_mars_would_take_thousands: Guhindura Mars vyafata ibihumbi vy'imyaka. Bisaba: gukomeza ikirere (gaze z'inzu y'ibimera), gushyushya ubuso (bigashongesha urubura), kwinjiza ibimera (ogisijene). Ubushakashatsi bwa NASA bwerekana ko CO2 iri kuri Mars ubu ari nkeya cane ku buryo bitakorwa hatabayeho kuzana vyinshi bivuye ahandi. Biracari ahanini inkuru z'ubuhanga bw'ubumenyi.
kirundi.hubble_stared_at_an_empty_patch_of_sky: Hubble yaravye ahantu ubusa mu kirere iminsi 10 ibona galagisi 3000 za kure. Raba neza + buri gace kijegajega ni galagisi.
kirundi.each_fuzzy_blob_is_a_galaxy_of_100_bil: Buri gace kijegajega ni galagisi y'inyenyeri miliyoni kugeza kuri magana ya miliyari
kirundi.in_1995_hubble_pointed_at_a_tiny_dark_: Mu 1995, Hubble yaravye agace gato k'umwijima mu kirere iminsi 10. Icavuyemo: galagisi 3000 za kure mu ishusho imwe. JWST yagiye kure kurushaho, yiga galagisi zo mu myaka miliyoni magana make ya mbere nyuma ya Big Bang.
kirundi.hotter_stars_look_bluer_cooler_stars_r: Inyenyeri zishyushye zisa n'ubururu; izikonje zisa n'umutuku. Inyenyeri zishyirwa mu vyiciro OBAFGKM ku bwoko bwa sipekitoro.
kirundi.red_dwarf_coolest_most_common_stars_75: Ingufi itukura — inyenyeri zikonje kandi nyinshi kurusha izindi (75% vy'inyenyeri zose)
kirundi.orange_dwarf_quieter_than_sun_longer_l: Ingufi y'oranje — ituje kurusha Izuba, ibaho igihe kirekire
kirundi.blue_hottest_rarest_stars_lifespans_on: Ubururu — inyenyeri zishyushye kandi nke kurusha izindi, zibaho imyaka miliyoni gusa
kirundi.star_color_temperature_astronomy_mnemo: Ibara ry'inyenyeri = ubushyuhe. Uburyo bwo kwibuka urukurikirane rwa sipekitoro OBAFGKM (uhereye ku zishyushye ujya ku zikonje): 'Oh Be A Fine Girl/Guy, Kiss Me.' Inyenyeri zishyushye ni nini + zimurika kurushaho + zibaho igihe gito.
kirundi.why_does_the_moon_always_show_the_same: Kuki Ukwezi guhora kwerekana uruhande rumwe? Imbaraga z'imiraba zagabanyije umuvuduko wo kuzenguruka kwako. Raba uko intera + misa bihindura igihe co gufatwa.
kirundi.tidal_forces_gradually_slow_a_moon_s_r: Imbaraga z'imiraba zigabanya buhoro kuzenguruka kw'ukwezi kugeza kuhuye n'igihe cako co kuzenguruka. Ukwezi kwacu gufashwe n'imiraba: uruhande rumwe ruhora rwerekeye ku Isi. Mercury iri muri resonance ya 3:2 n'Izuba (ntabwo yafashwe rwose).
kirundi.click_each_crater_real_planetary_scien: Kanda kuri buri mwobo. Abahanga b'imibumbe babarura imyobo kugira ngo bamenye imyaka y'ubuso — imyobo myinshi = bwa kera kurushaho.
kirundi.click_craters_to_count_them: 🔍 Kanda ku myobo kugira ngo uyibare
kirundi.crater_counting_is_how_scientists_dete: Kubara imyobo ni bwo buryo abahanga bamenya imyaka y'ubuso bw'imibumbe. Imyobo myinshi = ubuso bwa kera. Imisozi y'Ukwezi yuzuye imyobo (ya kera cane); ibibaya (maria) ni lave nshya.
kirundi.mass_curves_spacetime_drag_mass_watch_: Misa igoreka umwanya-igihe. Kurura misa + raba umwobo wimbika. Zungurutsa umupira urabe uko ugwamo.
kirundi.einstein_s_general_relativity_says_mas: Relativite rusange ya Einstein ivuga ko misa igoreka umwanya-igihe. Ibintu ntivyumva imbaraga — bikurikira imirongo migufi mu miterere igoretse. Ni yo rukuruzi. Imyobo y'umukara igoreka umwanya-igihe ku buryo ndetse n'urumuri rudasohoka.
kirundi.three_main_asteroid_types_c_s_m_mining: Ubwoko butatu bw'asteroyide: C, S, M. Amasosiyete y'ubucukuzi yifuza ubwoko bwa M kubera icuma + platine.
kirundi.most_common_75_dark_primitive_water_ri: Bwinshi kurusha ubundi (75%). Bw'umwijima, bwa kera, bukungahaye ku mazi. Buboneka mu mukandara wo hanze.
kirundi.stony_17_lighter_made_of_silicate_mine: Bw'urutare (17%). Bworoheje, bugizwe n'amabuye ya silikate + icuma. Buboneka mu mukandara wo imbere.
kirundi.metal_rich_8_mostly_iron_nickel_possib: Bukungahaye kuri metali (8%). Ahanini icuma + nikeli. Bishoboka ko buva ku ntima y'imibumbe ya mbere yavunitse. Intego y'ubucukuzi.
kirundi.light_from_380_000_years_after_the_big: Urumuri rw'imyaka 380,000 nyuma ya Big Bang. Impinduka ntoya ni imbuto za buri galagisi.
kirundi.temperature_fluctuations_of_0_0001_see: Impinduka z'ubushyuhe za hafi 0.001% — imbuto z'imiterere yose
kirundi.the_cmb_is_leftover_light_from_380_000: CMB ni urumuri rwasigaye rwo mu myaka 380,000 nyuma ya Big Bang. Impinduka ntoya z'ubushyuhe zerekana aho ibintu vyari vyegeranye gato kurushaho. Utwo duce twegeranye twakuze tuba galagisi + inyenyeri zose tubona uyu munsi. Vyavumbuwe ku mpanuka na Penzias + Wilson mu 1965 (Igihembo ca Nobel 1978).
kirundi.saturn_s_rings_are_99_water_ice_in_tri: Impeta za Saturn ni 99% urubura rw'amazi mu bice tiriyari. Zishobora kuba zifite imyaka miliyoni 100 gusa.
kirundi.saturn_s_rings_are_mostly_water_ice_pa: Impeta za Saturn ahanini ni uduce tw'urubura rw'amazi guhera ku mukungugu kugeza ku bice bingana n'inzu. Zirambuye ku km 282,000 ariko zifite ubugari buri munsi ya km 1. Bishoboka ko zavuye ku kwezi kwasenyutse mu myaka ~miliyoni 100 ishize — ni nshya!
kirundi.pick_a_core_surface_atmosphere_and_lif: Toranya intima, ubuso, ikirere, n'ubuzima. Raba ubwoko bw'isi wakoze.
kirundi.pulsars_are_spinning_neutron_stars_wit: Pulsar ni inyenyeri za neutron zizunguruka zifite imirasire ya magneti. Isi ibona urumuri gusa iyo umurasire unyuze.
kirundi.a_pulsar_is_a_rapidly_rotating_neutron: Pulsar ni inyenyeri ya neutron izenguruka vuba cane. Impera zayo za magneti zisohora imirasire. Tubona urumuri gusa iyo umurasire unyuze aho turi — nk'itara ryo ku nyanja. Zimwe zimurika inshuro 700 kuri isegonda. Jocelyn Bell Burnell yavumbuye iya mbere mu 1967.
kirundi.stream_of_charged_particles_from_sun_h: Umugezi w'uduce dufite amashanyarazi uva ku Zuba, ugakubita Isi. Umuyaga ukomeye = aurora nyinshi + kuvogera GPS.
kirundi.solar_wind_is_a_stream_of_charged_part: Umuyaga w'izuba ni umugezi w'uduce dufite amashanyarazi (ahanini poroton + elegitoro) utemba buri gihe uva ku Zuba. Umuvuduko uhindagurika 250-800 km/s. Inkubi zikomeye zitera aurora + zishobora kuvogera GPS + imiyoboro y'amashanyarazi. Ikibazo ca Carrington 1859: telegarafu zaturikanye zigafata umuriro.
kirundi.the_iss_orbits_earth_every_90_minutes_: ISS izenguruka Isi buri minota 90. Rimwe iba mu zuba, ubundi iba mu gicucu c'Isi.
kirundi.the_iss_orbits_400_km_up_at_17_500_mph: ISS izenguruka ku km 400 hejuru ku muvuduko wa 17,500 mph (28,000 km/h). Irangiza uruzenguruko rumwe buri minota 90 — bityo abogajuru babona izuba rirasa n'irirenga inshuro 16 ku munsi. ISS ni co kintu kinini kurusha ibindi abantu bigeze bubaka mu kirere.
kirundi.voyager_1_2_launched_1977_they_are_now: Voyager 1 + 2 zoherejwe mu 1977. Ubu ziri mu kirere kiri hagati y'inyenyeri; Voyager 1 yanyuze heliopause mu 2012 na Voyager 2 mu 2018.
kirundi.voyagers_1_2_launched_1977_to_study_ou: Voyager 1 + 2 zoherejwe mu 1977 kwiga imibumbe yo hanze. Zombi zanyuze heliopause (umupaka w'umuyaga w'izuba) mu 2012 + 2018 — ubu ziri mu kirere kiri hagati y'inyenyeri. Buri imwe itwaye Golden Record ifite indamukanyo + umuziki ku bantu b'ahandi bazishobora kubona.
kirundi.mercury_passes_in_front_of_the_sun_eve: Mercury inyura imbere y'Izuba buri myaka mike. Raba inyura — ariko gusa ukoresheje akayunguruzo k'izuba kabigenewe.
kirundi.watch_with_proper_solar_filter_only_ne: Raba ukoresheje AKAYUNGURUZO k'izuba KABIGENEWE gusa — NTUKIGERE UREBA IZUBA WERA!
kirundi.a_transit_happens_when_mercury_or_venu: Kunyura kubaho iyo Mercury (canke Venus) inyuze hagati y'Isi + Izuba. Bisa n'akadomo gato kirabura ku Zuba. Kunyura kwa Mercury gukurikira: 13 Ugushyingo 2032. Kunyura kwa Venus gukurikira: Ukuboza 2117 — ntikuzongera kubaho kugeza 2125.
kirundi.l_on_foucault_1851_proved_earth_rotate: Léon Foucault mu 1851 yerekanye ko Isi izenguruka akoresheje pandule nini. Urwego rwo kunyeganyega rwayo ruzenguruka vuba ku mpera.
kirundi.l_on_foucault_1851_demonstrated_earth_: Léon Foucault mu 1851 yerekanye ukuzenguruka kw'Isi akoresheje pandule nini. Urwego rwo kunyeganyega rwayo rusa n'aho ruzenguruka kuko Isi izenguruka munsi yarwo. Ku mpera: amasaha 24. Ku murongo wa ekwateri: nta na rimwe. Muri Maine: ~amasaha 34.
kirundi.saturn_s_north_pole_has_a_perfect_hexa: Impera y'amajyaruguru ya Saturn ifite inkubi y'impande esheshatu itunganye y'ubugari bwa km 30,000. Yavumbuwe na Voyager mu 1981.
kirundi.saturn_s_hexagonal_pole_storm: Inkubi y'Impande Esheshatu ku Mpera ya Saturn
kirundi.persistent_feature_30_000_km_wide_5_ea: Ikiranga gihoraho c'ubugari bwa km 30,000 — kirenze inshuro 2 umurambararo w'Isi
kirundi.saturn_has_a_perfect_hexagonal_storm_a: Saturn ifite inkubi y'impande esheshatu itunganye ku mpera yayo y'amajyaruguru — yafatiwe amashusho bwa mbere na Voyager (1981), vyemezwa na Cassini. Izo mpande esheshatu zifite ubugari bwa km 30,000 kandi zirahoraho. Kuki ari impande esheshatu? Imiterere y'umuyaga ukomeye wo mu kirere + imiraba ya Rossby.
kirundi.the_original_clock_as_the_sun_arcs_acr: Isaha ya mbere. Uko Izuba rinyura mu kirere, gnomon ita igicucu kizenguruka kigaragaza amasaha.
kirundi.sundials_predate_clocks_by_millennia_a: Amasaha y'izuba yabanjirije amasaha ya none mu binyejana vyinshi. Uko Izuba rinyura mu kirere, igicucu ca gnomon kirazenguruka. Abanyamisiri ba kera, Abagereki, Abaroma, n'Abashinwa bose bubatse amasaha y'izuba anoze. Ay'ubu agomba kunozwa ku gihe c'izuba + ikigereranyo c'igihe.
kirundi.80_galaxies_span_10_million_light_year: Galagisi 80 zirambuye ku myaka-rumuri miliyoni 10 hafi yacu. Nzira Nyamata + Andromeda zishobora kugongana mu myaka miliyari 4-5 — ubushakashatsi bwo mu 2025 buvuga ko amahirwe ari hafi 50/50.
kirundi.25k_ly_closest_to_mw: Imyaka-rumuri 25k — iri hafi ya MW kurusha izindi
kirundi.local_group_80_galaxies_in_10_million_: Itsinda ry'Ahantu Hegereye — galagisi ~80 mu myaka-rumuri miliyoni 10
kirundi.our_local_group_has_80_galaxies_domina: Itsinda ryacu ry'Ahantu Hegereye rifite galagisi ~80 ziyobowe na Nzira Nyamata + Andromeda. Andromeda iregera ku muvuduko wa 110 km/s — kugongana birashoboka mu myaka miliyari 4-5. Nibiba: galagisi nini Milkomeda.
kirundi.what_size_asteroid_kills_which_level_o: Asteroyide ingana ite yica urwego rw'ubuhe buzima? Gereranya kuva ku kabuye gato kugeza ku cishe dinozoro.
kirundi.atmospheric_entry_destroys_most_rocks_: Kwinjira mu kirere gusenya amabuye menshi ari munsi ya m 5. Chelyabinsk 2013 (m 20) yamennye amadirishya ariko nta mwobo. Tunguska 1908 (m 50) yahiritse ishyamba rya km² 2000. Chicxulub imyaka miliyoni 66 ishize (km 10) yishe dinozoro.
kirundi.a_cme_blasts_billions_of_tons_of_plasm: CME irasa miliyari z'ibiro vya plazima ziva ku Zuba. Nyuma y'iminsi, ishobora gutera aurora nziza + gutuma GPS ipfa.
kirundi.a_coronal_mass_ejection_blasts_billion: Gusohoka kwa Misa ya Korona kurasa miliyari z'ibiro vya plazima mu kirere ku muvuduko wa miliyoni 1-2 mph. Bifata iminsi 1-5 kugera ku Isi. CME zikomeye zitera inkubi za jewomagnetike, aurora zisa neza, kandi zishobora kuvogera ivyogajuru + imiyoboro y'amashanyarazi.
kirundi.cepheids_pulse_on_a_regular_cycle_thei: Cepheid zimurika ku ruziga ruhoraho. Igihe cazo cerekana urumuri rwazo nyakuri — ni umurongo w'ipima w'isanzure.
kirundi.cepheid_variables_pulse_on_a_regular_c: Cepheid zihindagurika zimurika ku ruziga ruhoraho. Igihe cazo gifitanye isano itaziguye n'urumuri rwazo bwite (Henrietta Leavitt 1908). Abahanga bapima ico gihe + bakagikoresha kugira ngo bamenye urumuri nyakuri + intera.
kirundi.orbits_range_from_circles_to_long_elli: Ama orbite atangira ku ruziga akagera ku ma elipsi maremare. Hindura eksantirisite ushushanye inzira zisa n'iz'imibumbe canke iz'inyenyeri z'imirizo.
kirundi.orbital_eccentricity_goes_from_0_perfe: Eksantirisite y'orbite iva kuri 0 (uruziga rutunganye) igera kuri 1 (kuva mu isanzure ku buryo bwa parabole). Imibumbe iri hafi y'uruziga. Inyenyeri z'imirizo zifite elipsi ikabije — zegera Izuba cane + zikajya kure mu isanzure ryo hanze. Ama orbite ya hiperbole (e>1) bivuze kunyura rimwe gusa muri sisitemu y'izuba.
kirundi.earth_s_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelen: Ikirere c'Isi gihagarika uburabure bw'imiraba bwinshi. Urumuri rugaragara, radiyo, na bimwe mu nfarageru bigera hasi.
kirundi.visible_light_radio_waves_penetrate_th: ✔ Urumuri rugaragara, imiraba ya radiyo, na bimwe mu nfarageru bigera hasi
kirundi.earth_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelengt: Ikirere c'Isi gihagarika uburabure bw'imiraba bwinshi. Urumuri rugaragara, radiyo, n'amadirishya amwe y'infarageru bigera hasi; ubumenyi bw'ikirere bwa UV, X, gama, n'infarageru nyinshi busaba ibigo vyo mu kirere nka Hubble, JWST, Chandra, na Fermi.
kirundi.spectra_reveal_temperature_composition_m: Sipekitoro zerekana ubushyuhe, ibigize, ukugenda, n'ibimenyetso vy'iciciro c'iterambere c'ikintu.
kirundi.expanding_ejecta_thousands_km_s: Ibisohotse birimo kwaguka: ibihumbi vya km/s
kirundi.spectral_line_strength_caution: Imbaraga z'umurongo si igipimo coroshye c'ubwinshi: ubushyuhe, ubwinshi, na ionizasiyo na vyo bigena ibiranga bigaragara cane. Izi mbago ni moderi zoroshye zo kwigisha.
kirundi.spectra_life_paths_note: Izi ngero si urutonde rumwe rw'igihe: inyenyeri isa n'Izuba ishobora kuba igihangange gitukura na nebule y'umubumbe, mu gihe supernova y'ubwoko bwa II irangiza ubuzima bw'inyenyeri nini.
kirundi.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_watch_when_i: Isi izenguruka 15° ku isaha. Raba igihe ari saa sita i Tokyo, n'igihe izuba rirasira i Portland.
kirundi.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_utc_coordina: Isi izenguruka 15° ku isaha. UTC (Igihe Mpuzamahanga Gihuriweho) ni co gipimo c'isi yose. Uturere tw'igihe dutandukanywa n'amasaha ±. Portland muri Maine ni UTC-5 (EST) canke UTC-4 (EDT). Ku isi hose, kimwe ca kabiri c'Isi kiba mu zuba mu gihe ikindi kiba mu ijoro.
kirundi.click_through_12_astronomy_facts_that_: Kanda unyure ku bintu 12 vy'ubumenyi bw'ikirere birenze ubwenge busanzwe.
kirundi.textbook_diagrams_lie_the_moon_is_much: Ibishushanyo vyo mu bitabo birabeshya. Ukwezi kuri kure cane kurusha uko bishushanywa. Raba igipimo nyakuri.
kirundi.most_textbooks_draw_the_moon_too_big_t: Ibitabo vyinshi bishushanya Ukwezi kunini cane + kwegereye cane. Ukuri: umurambararo w'Ukwezi ni 1/4 c'uw'Isi, kandi intera igera ku Kwezi ni ~imirambararo 30 y'Isi. Urumuri rufata amasegonda 1.3 kugira ngo rugende urwo rugendo.
kirundi.jupiter_has_the_shortest_day_10_hr_ven: Jupiter ifite umunsi mugufi kurusha iyindi (amasaha 10). Venus ifite muremure kurusha iyindi (iminsi 243 y'Isi!).
kirundi.day_length_across_the_solar_system_log: Uburabure bw'umunsi muri Sisitemu y'Izuba (igipimo ca log)
kirundi.jupiter_spins_fast_venus_rotates_slowe: Jupiter izenguruka vuba. Venus izenguruka buhoro kurusha umwaka wayo.
kirundi.gas_giants_spin_fast_because_of_how_th: Ibihangange vya gaze bizenguruka vuba kubera uko vyakozwe. Venus izenguruka buhoro kurusha izindi, wenda bitewe n'imiraba y'izuba + gukururwa n'ikirere gikomeye. Isi igenda igabanya umuvuduko wa ~milisegonda 1.7 ku kinyejana bitewe na rukuruzi y'Ukwezi.
kirundi.total_eclipses_cover_narrow_strips_the: Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bupfukirana imirongo mifunganye. Inzira y'ubwirakabiri bwo mu 2024 yanyuze mu majyaruguru ya Maine.
kirundi.april_8_2024_total_solar_eclipse_path: Inzira y'Ubwirakabiri Bwuzuye bw'Izuba bwo ku ya 8 Mata 2024
kirundi.total_solar_eclipses_only_happen_along: Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bw'izuba bubaho gusa ku nzira nyoroheje z'ubugari bwa ~km 100-150. Ubwirakabiri bwo ku ya 8 Mata 2024 bwanyuze mu majyaruguru ya Maine — Abanyamaine benshi bagiye mu majyaruguru kubona ubwuzuye. Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bukurikira buzabonwa muri Maine: 1 Gicurasi 2079.
kirundi.sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_13_8_billion_y: Kalendari y'Isanzure ya Sagan: imyaka miliyari 13.8 mu mwaka umwe. Abantu bagera mu isegonda ya nyuma.
kirundi.carl_sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_compresse: Kalendari y'Isanzure ya Carl Sagan: ihuza imyaka miliyari 13.8 mu mwaka 1. Big Bang = 1 Mutarama. Ubu = 31 Ukuboza saa sita z'ijoro. Abantu bagaragaye mu masegonda ya nyuma. Imico ibaho mu gice gito c'isegonda ya nyuma.
kirundi.how_many_alien_civilizations_adjust_ea: Imico y'abanyamahanga ingahe? Hindura buri kintu kitazwi + urabe igisubizo.
kirundi.in_our_milky_way_galaxy_at_any_time: muri Galagisi yacu ya Nzira Nyamata igihe ico ari co cose
kirundi.ne_habitable_per_system: ne: Umubare w'ituwe kuri buri sisitemu
kirundi.frank_drake_1961_estimating_other_civi: Frank Drake 1961: kugereranya izindi mico. Ibintu vyinshi ntibizwi — ibisubizo biva kuri <1 (turi twenyine) bikagera kuri miliyoni. Bigaragaza ivyo tutazi kurusha uko bitanga igisubizo. Hindura imirongo y'itoranya urabe uko igisubizo gihinduka vuba.
kirundi.dozen_biggest_best_telescopes_hubble_j: Telesikopi cumi n'evyiri nini kandi nziza kurusha izindi: Hubble, JWST, Keck, VLT, ALMA, n'ivyo ziraba.
kirundi.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_30_year_: Telesikopi yo mu kirere ya optike/UV/IR. Imaze imyaka 30+ ikora.
kirundi.infrared_space_telescope_at_l2_lagrang: Telesikopi yo mu kirere y'infarageru. Iri ku kibanza ca Lagrange L2.
kirundi.twin_10m_telescopes_on_mauna_kea_hawai: Telesikopi evyiri za m 10 kuri Mauna Kea, Hawaii.
kirundi.eso_chile_four_8_2m_telescopes: ESO muri Shili, telesikopi enye za m 8.2.
kirundi.twin_8m_mauna_kea_cerro_pach_n: Evyiri za m 8: Mauna Kea + Cerro Pachón.
kirundi.66_antenna_radio_array_chilean_desert: Urukurikirane rwa radiyo rw'antene 66, mu butayu bwa Shili.
kirundi.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_still_op: Telesikopi yo mu kirere ya optike/UV/IR. Iracakora.
kirundi.nasa_x_ray_space_telescope: Telesikopi yo mu kirere y'imirasire X ya NASA.
kirundi.infrared_space_telescope_retired_2020: Telesikopi yo mu kirere y'infarageru, yahagaritswe mu 2020.
kirundi.japanese_8_2m_on_mauna_kea: Iy'Ubuyapani ya m 8.2 kuri Mauna Kea.
kirundi.future_radio_telescope_australia_s_afr: Telesikopi ya radiyo izaza, Ositaraliya + Afurika y'Epfo.
kirundi.coming_39m_eso_telescope_chile: Telesikopi ya ESO ya m 39 izaza. Shili.
kirundi.a_dozen_of_the_world_s_most_powerful_t: Telesikopi cumi n'evyiri zikomeye kurusha izindi ku isi. Umuryango (cm) ni umurambararo w'indorerwamo y'ibanze. Umuryango munini = urumuri rwinshi + ibintu bito bigaragara. Telesikopi zo mu kirere zirinda kugoreka kw'ikirere.
kirundi.massive_stars_live_fast_die_young_adju: Inyenyeri nini zibaho vuba zigapfa zikiri nto. Hindura misa + urabe igihe inyenyeri imara itwika.
kirundi.massive_stars_burn_fuel_fast_lifespan_: Inyenyeri nini zitwika lisansi vuba. Ubuzima ∝ M^-2.5. Izuba: imyaka miliyari 10 (turi hagati). 10 M☉: imyaka miliyoni 30 gusa. Ingufi itukura ya 0.1 M☉: imyaka tiriyari.
kirundi.track_your_progress_planets_explored_p: Kurikirana aho ugeze: imibumbe wasuye, amanota wabonye, ubutumwa wanditse.
kirundi.this_tool_features_35_interactive_mini: Iki gikoresho gifite ibikoresho bito 35+ bikorana n'umukoresha birabana n'ubumenyi bw'ikirere, fizika, n'ubushakashatsi. Uhereye kuri simulation y'imyobo y'umukara ukageza ku kuguruka ku vyogajuru bimanuka ku Kwezi, ushobora gushakashaka Sisitemu y'Izuba n'ibirenze.
kirundi.16_milestones_from_ancient_greek_astro: Ivyagezweho 16 kuva ku bumenyi bw'ikirere bw'Abagereki ba kera kugeza kuri JWST. Amazina ugomba kumenya.
kirundi.a_2300_year_journey_from_aristarchus_t: Urugendo rw'imyaka 2300 kuva Aristarchus kugeza JWST. Buri cavumbuwe cubatswe ku cakibanjirije. Ubumenyi ni isiganwa ry'itanga-ryakira — buri muhanga w'ikirere ahagarara ku bitugu vy'abamubanjirije.
kirundi.compare_spectral_classes_temperature_fin: Gereranya ivyiciro vy'ubushyuhe bw'ubuso n'ibimenyetso vya sipekitoro bibiranga.
kirundi.spectral_class_size_caution: Ubunini bw'uduziga bwashyizweho bungana ku bushake. Iciciro ca sipekitoro gisobanura ubushyuhe n'imiterere y'imirongo, si rayo canke urumuri ubwarwo; iciciro c'urumuri V gisobanura urukurikirane rukuru, III gisobanura igihangange, na I gisobanura igihangange kinini.
kirundi.m_class_dwarf_supergiant_note: Inyuguti imwe ishobora kuba ku nyenyeri zitandukanye cane: Proxima Centauri ni ingufi ya M, naho Betelgeuse ni igihangange kinini ca M. Izuba ni G2 V.
kirundi.mars_has_100_thinner_air_made_of_mostl: Mars ifite umwuka woroheje inshuro 100 ahanini ugizwe na CO₂. Gereranya ibigize gaze + igitutu.
kirundi.mars_atmosphere_is_100_thinner_than_ea: Ikirere ca Mars ni coroheje inshuro 100 kurusha ic'Isi. Ibigize: 95% CO₂. Kugira ngo uhumeke kuri Mars wakenera ogisijene + igitutu inshuro 100 kurushaho. Nta azote ihagije yo kuvubura.
kirundi.10_essential_black_hole_terms_event_ho: Amagambo 10 y'ingenzi y'umwobo w'umukara: umupaka w'ivyabaye, ingingo imwe, spaghettification, imirasire ya Hawking.
kirundi.event_horizon_telescope_captured_first: Event Horizon Telescope yafashe ishusho ya mbere y'umwobo w'umukara M87* (2019) + Sgr A* (2022). Impeta y'oranje = urumuri rugoretse hafi y'umupira w'umukara aho urumuri rudashobora gusohoka.
kirundi.five_planets_have_auroras_earth_s_is_g: Imibumbe itanu ifite aurora. Iy'Isi ni icatsi/umutuku, iya Jupiter ni yo ikomeye kurusha izindi, iya Mars iratatanye.
kirundi.green_oxygen_red_atomic_o_blue_nitroge: Icatsi (ogisijene) + umutuku (O ya atomu) + ubururu (azote). Ibonwa neza hafi y'impera za magneti.
kirundi.most_powerful_in_solar_system_driven_b: Ikomeye kurusha izindi muri sisitemu y'izuba. Iterwa n'ibirunga vya Io + umurima wa magneti wa Jupiter. Aurora ya UV ihoraho.
kirundi.powered_by_solar_wind_less_colorful_th: Iterwa n'umuyaga w'izuba. Ntifite amabara menshi nk'iy'Isi ariko ni nini. Imara iminsi myinshi.
kirundi.strange_orientation_due_to_98_axial_ti: Ifite icerekezo gitangaje kubera kunama kw'umurongo kwa 98°. Bigoye kuyifata amashusho.
kirundi.weak_no_global_magnetic_field_auroras_: Iroroheje — nta murima wa magneti w'umubumbe wose. Aurora iba hafi y'utuce twa magneti dusigaye mu gishishwa.
kirundi.10_missions_that_defined_planetary_exp: Ubutumwa 10 bwaranze ubushakashatsi bw'imibumbe. Kuva kuri Apollo kugeza Cassini kugeza JWST.
kirundi.first_humans_walk_on_moon: Abantu ba mbere bagenda ku Kwezi
kirundi.first_mars_landers_life_experiments: Ivyogajuru vya mbere vyaguye kuri Mars + ibigeragezo vy'ubuzima
kirundi.nuclear_powered_rover_still_active: Rover ikoresha ingufu za nikleyeri, iracakora
kirundi.first_close_up_of_pluto_arrokoth: Amashusho ya mbere ya hafi ya Pluto + Arrokoth
kirundi.first_planetary_defense_test: Ikigeragezo ca mbere co kurinda imibumbe
kirundi.rover_first_mars_helicopter: Rover + kajugujugu ya mbere ya Mars
kirundi.replaced_hubble_for_infrared_deep_fiel: Yuzuza Hubble ku bibaya vyimbitse vy'infarageru
kirundi.brightness_counts_backward_smaller_bri: Urumuri rubarwa rusubira inyuma: gito = rumurika kurushaho. Urwego rugaragara rurambuye ku bipimo 60.
kirundi.faintest_naked_eye: Iyoroheje kurusha izindi ijisho ryera ribona
kirundi.backyard_scope_limit: Urugero rwa telesikopi yo mu rugo
kirundi.magnitudes_count_backward_smaller_brig: Ibipimo bibarwa BISUBIRA INYUMA: gito = rumurika kurushaho. Buri ntambwe ya 5 = kumurika inshuro 100. Hipparchus yabihimvye mu 130 BCE. Izuba: -26.7. JWST ibona kugeza ku gipimo 34. Ni ukuvuga: 100^((34-(-26))/5) ≈ inshuro 10^24 zoroheje kurusha Izuba.
kirundi.four_ways_astronomers_describe_positio: Uburyo bune abahanga b'ikirere basobanuramo ibibanza mu kirere.
kirundi.star_fixed_coordinates_right_ascension: Ibipimo bishingiye ku nyenyeri. Ascension droite (h:m:s) + Déclinaison (°). Bikoreshwa muri katalogi z'ikirere.
kirundi.observer_centered_altitude_above_horiz: Bishingiye ku uraba. Uburabure (hejuru y'aho ijisho rigarukira) + Azimut (uhereye mu majyaruguru). Bikoreshwa mu kwerekeza telesikopi.
kirundi.centered_on_sun_earth_plane_used_for_s: Ishingiye ku rwego Izuba-Isi. Ikoreshwa ku bintu vya sisitemu y'izuba.
kirundi.centered_on_milky_way_plane_used_for_g: Ishingiye ku rwego rwa Nzira Nyamata. Ikoreshwa mu bushakashatsi bwa galagisi.
kirundi.astronomers_use_multiple_coordinate_sy: Abahanga b'ikirere bakoresha sisitemu nyinshi z'ibipimo. Iy'ekwateri ni iy'isi yose + ibintu bigumana ibipimo bimwe mu gihe Isi izenguruka. Alt-Az ihinduka buri kanya uko Isi izenguruka. Iya galagisi ni yo nziza mu kwiga imiterere ya Nzira Nyamata.
kirundi.from_1_sun_to_10_22_stars_the_scale_of: Kuva ku Zuba 1 kugeza ku nyenyeri 10^22. Ubunini bw'isanzure buratangaje.
kirundi.astronomy_operates_on_absurd_scales_ho: Ubumenyi bw'ikirere bukorera ku bipimo bidasanzwe. « Inyenyeri zingahe? » — zirenze imyanya y'umusenyi ku nkombe zose z'Isi. « Zifite imyaka ingahe? » — miliyari 13.8. Nyamara ibindi bipimo (kwiyoyoka kw'umwobo w'umukara) ni binini kurushaho.
kirundi.36_500_objects_orbit_earth_at_various_: Ibintu 36,500 bizenguruka Isi ku burabure butandukanye. Nyuza umurongo w'uburabure urabe ibihari.
kirundi.36_500_tracked_objects_millions_of_fra: Ibintu 36,500 bikurikiranwa + miliyoni z'ibice bizenguruka Isi. Akaga ka Kessler Syndrome: urukurikirane rwo kugongana rutuma ikirere kitakoreshwa. SpaceX Starlink ifite ivyogajuru 5000+; iteganya ibindi vyinshi.
kirundi.every_culture_sees_stories_in_the_star: Buri muco ubona inkuru mu nyenyeri. Kuva ku ntwari z'Abagereki kugeza kuri Emu yo mu Kirere y'Abasangwabutaka.
kirundi.stories_projected_onto_stars_by_cultur: Inkuru zashyizwe ku nyenyeri n'imico yo ku isi hose. Emu yo mu Kirere y'Abasangwabutaka ba Ositaraliya ikoresha ibicu vy'umukungugu w'umwijima. Abagenzi bo muri Polineziya bakoresha inyenyeri kugira ngo bayobore mu nyanja ya Pasifika bavyibutse. Ubumenyi bw'ikirere ni no kuvuga inkuru.
kirundi.5_ways_astronomers_find_planets_around: Uburyo 5 abahanga b'ikirere babonamo imibumbe hafi y'izindi nyenyeri. Kunyura + Doppler ni vyo vyiganje.
kirundi.watch_a_star_and_look_for_tiny_brightn: Raba inyenyeri urondera kugabanuka gato k'urumuri iyo umubumbe unyuze imbere. Bwakoreshejwe na Kepler + TESS.
kirundi.a_planet_s_gravity_makes_its_star_wobb: Rukuruzi y'umubumbe ituma inyenyeri yawo ijegajega. Tubona uko kujegajega nk'impinduka ya Doppler mu rumuri rw'inyenyeri.
kirundi.gravity_of_a_passing_star_planet_bends: Rukuruzi y'inyenyeri+umubumbe binyura igoreka urumuri rw'inyenyeri iri kure kurushaho. Ntibiterwa n'intera.
kirundi.block_out_the_star_s_light_photograph_: Hagarika urumuri rw'inyenyeri + ufate amafoto y'imibumbe iri hafi. Kugeza ubu bikora gusa ku mibumbe minini/iri kure.
kirundi.variations_in_pulsar_pulses_reveal_orb: Impinduka mu mirasire ya pulsar zerekana imibiri izenguruka. Exoplanets za mbere zabonetse muri ubu buryo (1992).
kirundi.first_exoplanet_around_a_sun_like_star: Exoplanet ya mbere hafi y'inyenyeri isa n'Izuba: 51 Pegasi b (1995). Ubu 6,300+ zemejwe. JWST irimo gukora sipekitoroskopi y'ikirere kuri exoplanets — irondera ibimenyetso vy'ubuzima.
kirundi.schedule_of_eclipses_2024_2079_maine_s: Gahunda y'ubwirakabiri 2024-2079. Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bw'izuba bukurikira muri Maine: 2079.
kirundi.total_solar_eclipses_are_rare_about_2_: Ubwirakabiri bwuzuye bw'izuba ni gake. Hafi rimwe buri mezi 18 ahantu runaka ku Isi, ariko buri bumwe bubonwa gusa ku nzira ifunganye. Ubwirakabiri bw'ukwezi bubonwa ku ruhande rwose rw'ijoro.
kirundi.hubble_s_classification_spirals_ellipt: Ishyirwa mu vyiciro rya Hubble: ibizunguruzi, elipsi, izidafite imiterere + ibiri hagati.
kirundi.tight_arms_big_central_bulge: Amaboko yegeranye, ikivyimba kinini co hagati
kirundi.edwin_hubble_classified_galaxies_in_19: Edwin Hubble yashyize galagisi mu vyiciro mu 1936 — « ikanya ca Hubble ». Ibizunguruzi + elipsi + izidafite imiterere. Galagisi zikura zihurira — Nzira Nyamata iri hagati y'ubuzima bwayo; guhurira na Andromeda bishobora kuza mu myaka miliyari (ubushakashatsi bwo mu 2025 buvuga ko amahirwe ari hafi 50/50).
kirundi.from_walking_to_light_speed_log_scale_: Kuva ku kugenda n'amaguru kugeza ku muvuduko w'urumuri (igipimo ca log). Voyager 1 ni co kintu cakozwe n'abantu kiri kure kurusha ibindi kandi ni kimwe mu vyogajuru vyacu vyihuta bigana hanze, ariko kiracagenda buhoro cane ugereranyije n'isanzure.
kirundi.voyager_1_is_the_fastest_object_humans: Voyager 1 yihuta ugereranyije n'ibindi vyogajuru kandi ubu ni co kintu cakozwe n'abantu kiri kure kurusha ibindi, nyamara cakenera imyaka ~80,000 ngo kigere ku nyenyeri iri hafi kurusha izindi. Urumuri rukora urwo rugendo mu myaka 4.
kirundi.watch_stars_form_from_cold_dust_to_hot: Raba inyenyeri zikorwa kuva ku mukungugu ukonje kugeza ku zuba rishyushye. Ivyiciro 6 mu myaka miliyoni mike.
kirundi.stars_are_born_in_clusters_from_giant_: Inyenyeri zivukira mu matsinda zivuye mu bicu binini vya molekile. Igikorwa cose: imyaka miliyoni mike. Ingero zizwi: Nebule ya Orion (M42), Nebule ya Kagoma (Inkingi z'Iremwa), Nebule ya Tarantula.
kirundi.10_of_the_deepest_open_questions_in_co: Ibibazo 10 vyimbitse kurusha ibindi bitarasubizwa muri kosimoloji. Bimwe bifite ibisubizo bike; ibindi ni amayobera nyayo.
kirundi.quick_table_of_planet_properties_diame: Imbonerahamwe yihuse y'ibiranga imibumbe. Umurambararo, rukuruzi, uburabure bw'umunsi, amezi.
kirundi.side_by_side_comparison_of_key_planet_: Ugereranya uruhande ku rundi rw'ibiranga vy'ingenzi vy'imibumbe. Isi = urwego rw'ibanze. Izuba rifite umurambararo ungana n'inshuro 109 z'uw'Isi (kurenza inshuro miliyoni ubunini bwaryo). Jupiter ifite amezi 115 azwi. Venus izenguruka buhoro ku buryo umunsi wayo urenza umwaka wayo.
kirundi.40_visual_interactive_mini_tools_made_: Ibikoresho bito 40+ bigaragara + bikorana n'umukoresha. Vyakorewe abanyeshure n'abakuru bashaka kumenya.
kirundi.40_interactive_mini_tools_svg_visualiz: Ibikoresho bito 40+ bikorana n'umukoresha, amashusho ya SVG, na simulation z'uburezi.
kirundi.from_a_moon_phase_dial_to_a_black_hole: Kuva ku ruziga rw'ivyiciro vy'ukwezi kugeza ku mwerekanyi w'umwobo w'umukara kugeza kuri pandule ya Foucault, buri gikoresho cubatswe kugira ngo ibitekerezo bidafatika bigaragare + bikinishwe.
kirundi.built_for_k_12_curious_adults_open_all: Cakorewe K-12 + abakuru bashaka kumenya. Fungura ibikoresho vyose, canke kimwe gusa — buri kimwe gikora ubwaco.
kirundi.part_of_alloflow_stem_lab_built_in_mai: Ni igice ca AlloFlow STEM Lab. Cubatswe muri Maine, USA. Amakuru yose yavuye kuri NASA, ESA, JAXA, USGS, IAU + inkomoko z'ubumenyi rusange. Gukoreshwa mu burezi ni ubuntu.
kirundi.meteor_shower_calendar: ☄ Kalendari y'Imvura y'Ibisasu vyo mu Kirere
kirundi.9_annual_meteor_showers_their_best_vie: Imvura 9 z'ibisasu vyo mu kirere za buri mwaka + iminsi myiza yo kubiraba. Andika mu kalendari yawe.
kirundi.meteor_showers_happen_when_earth_cross: Imvura y'ibisasu vyo mu kirere ibaho iyo Isi inyuze mu myanda y'inyenyeri y'umurizo. Igihe ciza co kuraba: ahantu h'umwijima, Ukwezi kudahari, nyuma ya saa sita z'ijoro. Perseids + Geminids ni zo mvura za buri mwaka zizewe kurusha izindi.
kirundi.10_quotes_from_astronomers_space_trave: Amagambo 10 y'abahanga b'ikirere + abagenzi bo mu kirere agaragaza gutangara.
kirundi.tonight_sky_observing_guide: 🔭 Ubuyobozi bwo Kuraba Ikirere Muri Iri Joro
kirundi.10_things_you_can_spot_tonight_with_ju: Ibintu 10 ushobora kubona muri iri joro ukoresheje amaso yawe gusa canke binokuli.
kirundi.best_naked_eye_observing_dark_site_awa: Kuraba neza n'amaso yera: ahantu h'umwijima (kure y'amatara y'umujyi), Ukwezi kuri munsi y'aho ijisho rigarukira, amaso yamenyereye umwijima (iminota 20-30 mu mwijima). Za porogaramu z'ubuntu: Stellarium, SkyView, Star Walk zifasha kumenya ico urimo kuraba.
kirundi.carl_sagan_s_most_quoted_reflection_a_: Ibitekerezo vya Carl Sagan bikunze kuvugwa kurusha ibindi. Pikiseli imwe irimo buri wese twigeze kumenya.
kirundi.from_this_distant_vantage_point_the_ea: « Uhereye kuri iyi ntera ya kure, Isi ishobora kuba isa n'aho itagira ico imaze. Ariko kuri twe, ni ukundi. Ongera urabe ako kadomo. Ni hano. Ni iwacu. Ni twe. Kuri ko, buri wese ukunda, buri wese uzi, buri wese wigeze kumva bavuga, buri muntu wese wabayeho, yamaze ubuzima bwe. »
kirundi.voyager_1_took_this_photo_of_earth_fro: Voyager 1 yafashe iyi foto y'Isi iri mu ntera ya km miliyari 6 ku ya 14 Gashyantare 1990 — vyasabwe na Carl Sagan. Isi ni pikiseli imwe. Buri muntu wese mu mateka yabayeho kuri iyo pikiseli.
kirundi.8_iconic_deep_sky_objects_star_nurseri: Ibintu 8 bizwi vyo mu kirere cimbitse. Ahavukira inyenyeri, ibishishwa vy'inyenyeri zipfa, ibisigazwa vya supernova.
kirundi.stellar_nursery_24_ly_across_visible_n: Ahavukira inyenyeri hafite ubugari bw'imyaka-rumuri 24. Habonwa n'amaso yera mu Nkota ya Orion.
kirundi.remains_of_supernova_witnessed_in_1054: Ibisigazwa vya supernova yabonywe mu 1054 CE. Irimo pulsar.
kirundi.planetary_nebula_in_lyra_glowing_shell: Nebule y'umubumbe muri Lyra. Igishishwa kimurika c'inyenyeri isa n'Izuba iri gupfa.
kirundi.home_of_pillars_of_creation_hubble_199: Aho Inkingi z'Iremwa ziri (Hubble 1995). Inkingi zikorerwamo inyenyeri.
kirundi.complex_planetary_nebula_many_shell_la: Nebule y'umubumbe igoye. Inzego nyinshi z'ibishishwa ziturutse ku guhinda.
kirundi.closest_planetary_nebula_looks_like_an: Nebule y'umubumbe iri hafi kurusha izindi. Isa n'ijisho mu kirere.
kirundi.in_large_magellanic_cloud_largest_know: Iri mu Gicu Kinini ca Magellan. Agace kanini kurusha utundi kazwi aho inyenyeri zikorerwa.
kirundi.supernova_remnant_8000_years_old_massi: Ibisigazwa vya supernova vy'imyaka ~8000. Imirongo minini muri Cygnus.
kirundi.what_you_need_to_start_observing_from_: Ico ukeneye kugira ngo utangire kuraba — kuva kuri porogaramu z'ubuntu kugeza kuri telesikopi zihuye n'ingengo y'imari iyo ari yo yose.
kirundi.free_planetarium_software_shows_night_: Porogaramu y'ubuntu ya planetariyumu. Yerekana ikirere ca nijoro ahantu hose, igihe cose.
kirundi.phone_app_point_at_sky_to_identify_wha: Porogaramu ya telefoni. Yerekeze ku kirere kugira ngo imenye ico urimo kuraba.
kirundi.interactive_3d_solar_system_jwst_missi: Sisitemu y'izuba ya 3D ikorana n'umukoresha + JWST + kwerekana ubutumwa.
kirundi.best_starter_scope_reveals_galilean_mo: Igikoresho ciza co gutangiraho. Kigaragaza amezi ya Galileo ya Jupiter, Andromeda, itsinda rya Pleiades.
kirundi.celestron_starsense_explorer_102_or_or: Celestron StarSense Explorer 102 or Orion 4.5" Newtonian.
kirundi.celestron_nexstar_8se_or_apertura_ad8_: Celestron NexStar 8SE or Apertura AD8 Dobsonian.
kirundi.local_astronomy_club: Ikigo c'ubumenyi bw'ikirere co mu karere kawe
kirundi.most_cities_have_one_members_lend_scop: Imijyi myinshi ifite kimwe. Abanyamuryango batiza telesikopi, barigisha, bakanategura iminsi yo kuraba inyenyeri.
kirundi.drive_30_min_from_city_lights_maine_is: Genda iminota 30+ mu modoka kure y'amatara y'umujyi. Maine yuzuye ahantu nk'aho. Katahdin Woods and Waters ni ahantu hemewe h'ikirere c'umwijima.
kirundi.most_important_tool_dark_sky_light_pol: Igikoresho c'ingenzi kurusha ibindi: ikirere c'umwijima. Umwanda w'urumuri usibanganya 90% vy'inyenyeri. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM na AMC Maine Woods ni ahantu hemewe ku rwego mpuzamahanga h'ikirere c'umwijima; Acadia na Baxter na ho hatanga ikirere c'umwijima ciza cane.
kirundi.star_s_fate_depends_on_mass_brown_dwar: Iherezo ry'inyenyeri riterwa na misa yayo: ingufi y'ikigina, ingufi yera, inyenyeri ya neutron, canke umwobo w'umukara.
kirundi.how_a_star_dies_depends_almost_entirel: Uko inyenyeri ipfa biterwa hafi ya vyose na misa yayo y'ibanze. Umupaka uri hagati y'inyenyeri ya neutron n'umwobo w'umukara ntuzwi neza (umupaka wa Tolman-Oppenheimer-Volkoff ~2-3 M☉ ku gisigaye).
kirundi.from_1km_to_93_billion_light_years_ref: Kuva kuri km 1 kugeza ku myaka-rumuri miliyari 93. Imbonerahamwe y'ibipimo vy'isanzure.
kirundi.distances_jump_in_scale_km_to_au_to_ly: Intera zisimburana ku bipimo: km kuri AU kuri myaka-rumuri kuri miliyari z'imyaka-rumuri. Buri ntambwe ni ~inshuro 10,000-100,000 nini kurushaho. Ubumenyi bw'ikirere bubaho ku gipimo ca log.
kirundi.maine_night_sky_by_season: 🌲 Ikirere ca Nijoro ca Maine ku Bihe vy'Umwaka
kirundi.maine_has_world_class_dark_skies_what_: Maine ifite ikirere c'umwijima ciza ku rwego mpuzamahanga. Ico waraba kuri buri gihe c'umwaka.
kirundi.maine_has_fantastic_dark_skies_especia: Maine ifite ikirere c'umwijima ciza cane — cane cane mu majyaruguru y'imijyi. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM na AMC Maine Woods ni ahantu hemewe ku rwego mpuzamahanga h'ikirere c'umwijima; Acadia, Allagash, Baxter, na Cobscook na ho ni h'umwijima mwiza. Amajoro y'itumba ni maremare + asobanutse neza.
kirundi.major_space_missions_events_2024_2027_: Ubutumwa bukomeye bw'ikirere + ivyabaye 2024-2027. Turi mu bihe bishimishije.
kirundi.space_exploration_is_in_a_renaissance_: Ubushakashatsi bw'ikirere buri mu ivugururwa rikomeye. Ibihugu bishya (Ubuhinde, Ubuyapani, UAE), amasosiyete mashya y'abikorera (SpaceX, Blue Origin), ubutumwa bushya (Europa Clipper, Artemis, JWST). Raba hejuru — kandi utege amatwi.
kirundi.quick_reference_summary_of_solar_syste: Incamake yihuse y'ibiri muri sisitemu y'izuba + uko misa igabanijwe.
kirundi.the_sun_contains_99_86_of_all_solar_sy: Izuba rifite 99.86% vya misa yose ya sisitemu y'izuba. Jupiter ifite bibiri vya gatatu vya 0.14% isigaye. Isi + ibindi vyose ni ibisigaye.
kirundi.from_our_own_luna_to_triton_enceladus_: Kuva ku Kwezi kwacu Luna kugeza kuri Triton + Enceladus. Amwe ni manini kurusha Mercury.
kirundi.most_spectacular_moons_in_the_solar_sy: Amezi ashimishije kurusha andi muri sisitemu y'izuba. Menshi ni manini kurusha Pluto. Europa + Enceladus + Titan afite inyanja munsi y'ubuso kandi ni intego z'ibanze mu bumenyi bw'ubuzima bwo mu kirere.
kirundi.astronomers_report_everything_in_utc_t: Abahanga b'ikirere batangaza vyose muri UTC. Ibisobanuro vy'uturere tw'igihe.
kirundi.utc_coordinated_universal_time_is_the_: UTC (Igihe Mpuzamahanga Gihuriweho) ni co gipimo c'isi yose. Gishingiye ku masaha ya atomike.
kirundi.astronomers_report_events_in_utc_so_ob: Abahanga b'ikirere batangaza ivyabaye muri UTC kugira ngo ibigo vyo ku isi hose bishobore kugereranya. SpaceX yohereza muri UTC. Ubutumwa bwa NASA buri muri UTC.
kirundi.maine_utc_5_est_or_utc_4_edt_london_ut: Maine: UTC-5 (EST) canke UTC-4 (EDT). Londres: UTC+0 (GMT) canke UTC+1 (BST). Ubuyapani: UTC+9.
kirundi.tip_when_you_read_an_astronomy_event_t: Inama: iyo usomye gahunda y'ibihe vy'ibikorwa vy'ubumenyi bw'ikirere, buri gihe raba niba iri muri UTC canke mu gihe c'aho uri.
kirundi.utc_replaced_gmt_in_1972_based_on_atom: UTC yasimbuye GMT mu 1972. Ishingiye ku masaha ya atomike y'ibigo vy'igihugu ku isi hose, hafashwe impuzandengo. Amasegonda yiyongera ashyirwaho igihe bikenewe.
kirundi.40_interactive_tools_to_explore_in_thi: Ibikoresho 40+ bikorana n'umukoresha vyo gushakashaka muri iyi porogaramu. Buri kimwe gifungura idirishya rishya ku kintu c'isanzure.
kirundi.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo: Ibintu 15 vy'isanzure bikwiye gushakwa. Vyinshi ni ubuntu + biri hafi.
kirundi.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo_2: Ibintu 15 vy'isanzure bikwiye gushakwa. Vyinshi ntaco bitwara uretse igihe. Ikirere ca nijoro nta co kigusaba — genda ukibonane.
kirundi.12_facts_that_defy_what_you_think_you_: Ibintu 12 bihakana ivyo utekereza ko uzi ku mibumbe.
kirundi.12_things_that_surprise_people_about_o: Ibintu 12 bitangaza abantu ku vyerekeye sisitemu yacu y'izuba. Buri kimwe gihakana ishusho isanzwe dutekereza.
kirundi.pioneer_plaques_voyager_golden_records: Ibisate vya Pioneer + Golden Records za Voyager + Ubutumwa bwa Arecibo — ibimenyetso vy'abantu ku wo ari we wese ushobora kuba adutega amatwi.
kirundi.gold_anodized_aluminum_on_pioneer_10_1: Aluminiyumu ipfukiranywe na zahabu kuri Pioneer 10 + 11. Yerekana abantu bambaye ubusa, aho Isi iri, na hidorojene.
kirundi.phonograph_record_on_voyager_1_2_115_p: Disiki ya fonogarafe kuri Voyager 1 + 2. Amafoto 115, umuziki (kuva Beethoven kugeza Chuck Berry), indamukanyo mu ndimi 55, amajwi y'Isi.
kirundi.radio_broadcast_to_globular_cluster_m1: Itangazo rya radiyo ryerekejwe ku itsinda ry'inyenyeri M13. Rizahagera mu myaka ~25,000.
kirundi.carl_sagan_frank_drake_linda_salzman_s: Carl Sagan + Frank Drake + Linda Salzman Sagan + abandi benshi ni bo babishushanyije. Komite ya Golden Record ya Voyager yarimo Ann Druyan — imiraba y'ubwonko bwe yashyizwe muri iyo disiki.

kirundi.click_any_planet_in_the_3d_view_to_sel: Kanda ku mubumbe uwo ari wo wose mu iraba rya 3D kugira ngo uwutoranye
